title_cn: 芬兰通力同意以 294 亿欧元收购 TK Elevator

title_cn: 西班牙通胀意外加速超过 2%

title_cn: 美伊僵局威胁长期供应冲击，油价上涨
summary: Oil rose as a US-Iran standoff over the crucial Strait of Hormuz dragged on, prolonging an unprecedented supply shock that has roiled energy markets.

title: Kalshi, Polymarket Face New Rival in Crypto’s Hottest Exchange
title_cn: Kalshi、Polymarket 在加密货币最热门的交易所面临新的竞争对手
summary: Hyperliquid, the decentralized crypto exchange that has emerged as one of the most active trading venues in digital assets, is proposing to add prediction markets to its platform — a direct challenge to Kalshi and Polymarket as the fast-growing sector draws new competitors.

title: UBS Says Rich Clients Lost Some Interest in Private Credit
title_cn: 瑞银表示富裕客户对私人信贷失去了一些兴趣
summary: UBS Group AG Chief Financial Officer Todd Tuckner said that recent developments have cooled excitement among the lender’s wealthy clients about private credit, adding to the challenges facing the asset class.

title: Russia Says It Has No Plans to Leave OPEC+ After UAE Exit
title_cn: 俄罗斯表示没有计划在阿联酋退出后退出OPEC+
summary: Russia said it has no plans of leaving its alliance with OPEC after the United Arab Emirates’ shock decision to quit the cartel raised questions about its future amid a historic supply disruption caused by the Iran war.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia’s Oil Station and Sanctioned Tanker

summary: Ukraine said it hit an oil pumping station deep inside Russia, as well as a sanctioned tanker in the Black Sea, marking the latest strikes on its adversary’s energy infrastructure.

title_cn: 欧洲央行考虑战争应对措施，德国通胀率低于预期

title_cn: 随着美国债务飙升，美国的债券市场特权正在消失
summary: For much of the past few years, US Treasuries have failed to serve their traditional role as a sure-fire refuge from global market meltdowns.

summary: S&P 500 Index futures are little changed as of 7:45 a.m. in New York ahead of a blockbuster slate of corporate earnings. Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon and Meta Platforms are set to report after the close.

title_cn: 欧洲食糖分歧因限制免税进口计划而加深
summary: The European Commission’s plan to curb some duty-free sugar imports to bolster prices is pitting beet growers against cane refiners and multinational food giants, in a dispute that risks undermining the region’s competitiveness.

title: Market Realizes Fed’s Bar to Hike Is High, JPM’s Misra Says
title_cn: 摩根大通的米斯拉表示，市场意识到美联储加息的门槛很高
summary: Priya Misra, Core Plus Bond ETF portfolio manager at JPMorgan, hopes that Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell stays on at the Fed “as a risk management move,” as he speaks at what is likely to be his final press conference as Fed chair. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Signals No Letup of Naval Blockade, Tech Results on Deck | The Opening Trade 4/29/2026
title_cn: 特朗普表示不会放松海军封锁，技术成果已出炉开盘交易 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary:
The US signaled it would stick with a naval blockade of Iranian ports, as it tries to choke-off Tehran’s oil exports and force it back to the negotiating table.

Stock traders are buying the dip in technology shares as markets get ready for earnings from four juggernauts in a crucial test of whether this month’s rally has room to run. Nasdaq 100 futures rebounded after the index slipped more than 1% in the previous session. Alphabet, Microsoft, Amazon.com and Meta Platforms are set to report after the close.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie.

Video edited at the 23:46 mark to remove an incorrectly worded question during the Santander interview.
This was verbally corrected later in the show.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stock Futures Edge Up on Tech Gains Before Megacap Earnings
title_cn: 在大型股盈利之前，美国股指期货因科技股上涨而小幅上涨
summary: US equity futures advanced on Wednesday as tech stocks climbed ahead of the earnings results from four megacap companies later in the day.

title: Cosco’s Profit Drops by Half as Lower Freight Rates Bite
title_cn: 运价下跌影响中远集团利润下降一半
summary: Cosco Shipping Holdings Co. reported a 50% drop in first-quarter profit on weaker freight rates, warning that war in the Middle East has posed “significant challenges” for the industry.

title: Iran War: Trump Posts 'No More Mr. Nice Guy' Caption | The Pulse 4/29

summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests:
Wolf von Rotberg, J Safra Sarasin, Equity Strategist; Gorana Grgić, ETH Zürich, Centre for Security Studies Global Security Head (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crop Prices Hit Highest Since 2023 as War and Bad Weather Bite
title_cn: 战争和恶劣天气影响农作物价格创 2023 年以来新高
summary: The extended closure of the Strait of Hormuz and extreme weather have jolted farm commodities prices to a two-year high, as fertilizer headaches and the prospect of smaller harvests drive food inflation risks.

title: China’s Shenzhen Relaxes Home Buying Rules to Boost Demand
title_cn: 中国深圳放宽购房规定以刺激需求
summary: China’s tech hub of Shenzhen will ease home buying restrictions in the city’s prime districts and raise housing provident fund loan caps in the latest attempt by authorities to contain the nation’s prolonged property slump.

title: Big Tech Earnings; No Letup of US Naval Blockade; Fed Decision | Bloomberg Brief 4/29/2026
title_cn: 大型科技公司的盈利；美国海军封锁没有放松；美联储决定|彭博简报 2026 年 4 月 29 日
summary: Nasdaq 100 futures rise with more than $14 trillion in market cap set to report after the market close, including Meta, Microsoft, Amazon and Alphabet. The US signals it will stick with a naval blockade of Iranian ports to force Tehran to the negotiating table. The Federal Reserve will announce its rate decision in what will likely be Chair Jerome Powell's last meeting as the head of the central bank. Andrew Hollenhorst of Citi looks ahead to the Fed's rate decision and its leadership transition. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chiesi Agrees to Buy KalVista Pharmaceuticals for $1.9 Billion
title_cn: Chiesi 同意以 19 亿美元收购 KalVista Pharmaceuticals
summary: Chiesi Farmaceutici SpA agreed to acquire US-listed KalVista Pharmaceuticals Inc. for about $1.9 billion in its biggest acquisition to date, expanding the Italian company’s rare immunology portfolio.

title: Former ECB's Trichet: the Enemies are Inflation Secondary Effects
title_cn: 前欧洲央行行长特里谢：敌人是通胀的二次效应
summary: The former ECB President Jean-Claude Trichet talks about the impact on Europe from the geopolitical tensions, a day before the ECB decision. He argues that recession is an option given the level of uncertainty, and the secondary effects of inflation are the real enemies of the ECB. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OpenAI Sued in US by Families of Canada School Shooting Victims
title_cn: OpenAI 在美国被加拿大校园枪击受害者家属起诉
summary: OpenAI is the target of new lawsuits over the mass shooting in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, that allege the artificial intelligence company could have stopped the suspected killer from using its popular chatbot, ChatGPT, ahead of the attack.

title_cn: 为什么人形机器人是人工智能的终极前沿

summary: Artificial intelligence-linked companies, including Anthropic PBC and OpenAI, have been rushing into London for office space in a surge that’s surprised local landlords.

summary: NXP Semiconductors NV jumped as much as 17% in premarket trading after giving an upbeat revenue forecast, a sign the chipmaker is bouncing back from a prolonged auto industry slump and tariff uncertainties.

title: Stocks Fall as Report on OpenAI Fuels Angst | The Close 4/28/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 报告引发焦虑，股市下跌收盘价 2026 年 4 月 28 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Raymond James’ Sunaina Sinha Haldea, Sysco CEO Kevin Hourican, Former Kansas City Fed President Thomas Hoenig, Fidelity’s Jurrien Timmer, Allspring Global Investments’ Abby Roach, Mizuho’s Dan Dolev, Gabelli Funds’ John Belton, & First Independence Bank CEO Kenneth Kelly. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Founder Jailed for Nine Years in $300 Million eFishery Case
title_cn: 创始人因价值 3 亿美元的 eFishery 案被判入狱九年
summary: Indonesia handed eFishery founder Gibran Huzaifah a nine-year prison sentence on Wednesday, concluding a high-profile $300 million financial scandal that destroyed one of Southeast Asia’s most celebrated startups.

title: China’s Meta Backlash Renders Manus Model ‘Officially Dead’
title_cn: 中国的元强烈反对使马努斯模式“正式死亡”

title_cn: 亿万富翁阿达尼的铜厂据说受到问题困扰

title: Nasdaq-Listed MakeMyTrip Said to Hire Banks for India Offering
title_cn: 纳斯达克上市公司 MakeMyTrip 据称将聘请银行开展印度业务
summary: MakeMyTrip Ltd., an online travel platform listed on the Nasdaq, is considering a listing in Mumbai, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Global Shocks Seen Spurring African Pivot to Domestic Capital
title_cn: 全球冲击促使非洲转向国内资本
summary: Rising geopolitical uncertainty is driving African financiers to tap domestic capital, as governments roll out policies, regulations and incentives to fund projects.

title: EU Escalates Meta Probe for Failing to Stop Kids Signing Up

title: Solaria Raises €300 Million to Fund Data Center, Battery Boost

summary: Spanish clean-energy producer Solaria Energía y Medio Ambiente SA has raised about €300 million in a share offering, with the funds to be deployed in expanding its data center and battery storage operations.

title: The Race to Merge AI With Humanoid Robots
title_cn: 人工智能与人形机器人融合的竞赛
summary: Humanoid robots that use AI are going mainstream, but they’re far from proven. With billions of dollars invested, can they deliver real-world value or will they fall short of the hype? (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Amadeus IT SA agreed to buy the public security arm of biometrics firm Idemia for €1.2 billion ($1.4 billion), adding border control to the Spanish travel software company’s airport services.

title: Sri Lanka Discloses New Payment Lapse Days After Hack Revelation
title_cn: 斯里兰卡在黑客事件曝光几天后披露了新的付款失败情况
summary: Sri Lanka’s government has disclosed a payment lapse involving funds due to the US Post, days after revealing a separate cyberattack, raising fresh questions about its financial safeguards as it continues to recover from an unprecedented default.

title: James Murdoch-Backed Allen Career Institute Is Said to Consider India IPO
title_cn: 詹姆斯·默多克支持的艾伦职业学院据说考虑在印度首次公开募股
summary: Allen Career Institute, an Indian education services company backed by James Murdoch and ex-Disney executive Uday Shankar, is considering an initial public offering in Mumbai, people familiar with the matter said.

title: GoTo CEO on 1st Net Profit Quarter
title_cn: GoTo首席执行官谈第一季度净利润
summary: Hans Patuwo, CEO of GoTo Group, discusses the Indonesian ride-hailing and food delivery business outlook and growth strategy after it reported its first-ever net income, a major milestone in its turnaround effort. He speaks with Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Thailand Turns to Durian Influencers to Clear Looming Glut
title_cn: 泰国向榴莲影响者求助以消除迫在眉睫的供应过剩
summary: Thailand is turning to livestreamers to clear a looming durian glut, slashing prices as weaker Chinese demand threatens its biggest export market.

title: AI Spots Pancreatic Cancer Years Before It Shows Up, Study Finds
title_cn: 研究发现，人工智能可以在胰腺癌出现前数年发现它
summary: An artificial intelligence system can spot pancreatic cancer long before it shows up on scans, raising the prospect of catching one of the deadliest tumors early enough to successfully treat, a study found.

title: Samsung Dynasty’s Wealth Doubles to $45 Billion in Just One Year
title_cn: 三星王朝财富仅一年就翻倍至450亿美元
summary: When Lee Kun-hee, the patriarch behind Samsung Electronics Co. died in 2020, his dynasty soon dealt with a crisis on two fronts: first, a multi-billion-dollar inheritance tax. The following year, his son Jay Y. Lee was jailed after being convicted of bribing South Korea’s former President Park Geun-hye to win support for his succession.

title: German Coalition Clears Crucial Healthcare, Budget Packages
title_cn: 德国联盟批准了重要的医疗保健和预算方案
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz’s cabinet approved a healthcare overhaul and a multi-year budget blueprint, laying the groundwork for a push to revive Germany’s economic growth.

title: Who Attended the State Dinner With King Charles
title_cn: 谁与查尔斯国王一起参加国宴
summary: Apple CEO Tim Cook, pro golfer Rory McIlroy and US Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh were among the guests who attended the state banquet for King Charles in Washington. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UAE Bristled at Saudis for Years Before Iran War Tipped Scales
title_cn: 在伊朗战争爆发之前，阿联酋多年来一直对沙特感到愤怒
summary: The United Arab Emirates’ worsening rift with Saudi Arabia was at the heart of its shock decision to quit OPEC.

title: Russian Speaking ‘El Money’ Recruited Arsonists to Target Starmer, Prosecutors Say
title_cn: 检察官称，俄语“El Money”招募纵火犯瞄准斯塔默
summary: A person who communicated in Russian and used the pseudonym “El Money” promised to pay alleged arsonists to light a series of fires that targeted property linked to UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer last year, prosecutors said at the start of a London trial.

title: Fugitive Linked to Benin Coup Bid Seeks Bail in South Africa
title_cn: 与贝宁政变有关的逃犯在南非寻求保释
summary: Kémi Séba, a French-born influencer wanted by the authorities in Benin in connection with an attempted coup in December, requested bail from a court in South Africa, where he’s accused of trying to exit the country illegally.

title: Trump Says Merz ‘Doesn’t Know What He’s Talking About’
title_cn: 特朗普称默兹“不知道他在说什么”
summary: Donald Trump attacked Germany’s Friedrich Merz after the chancellor criticized the US handling of its war on Iran.

title: Hegseth to Defend $1.5 Trillion Budget, Iran War at Hearing
title_cn: 赫格斯将在听证会上捍卫 1.5 万亿美元预算、伊朗战争
summary: Hearing will be first public questioning by Congress

title: Argentina Bond Investors Increasingly Fear the Day After Milei
title_cn: 阿根廷债券投资者越来越担心米莱之后的日子
summary: Concern is mounting once again in the bond market that Argentines are tiring of President Javier Milei and his radical economic reform agenda.

title: AI Presents 'Unique Risks' Warns Former IRS Chief
title_cn: 前国税局局长警告人工智能带来“独特风险”
summary: Daniel Werfel, former Commissioner of the US Internal Revenue Service, joined Caroline Hepker and Lizzy Burden on Bloomberg Radio as the UK's tax authority undertakes a major digital overhaul. HMRC is aiming to move most customer interactions online by 2030, while updating legacy systems and exploring the use of AI. Werfel, now with Public Digital, which is advising HMRC, discussed the challenges of delivering large-scale government transformation, as well as concerns around AI, data protection and the security of sensitive public sector systems. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin’s WWII Parade Cuts Tanks and Missiles For Use in Ukraine War
title_cn: 普京的二战阅兵削减了用于乌克兰战争的坦克和导弹
summary: Russia will stage its traditional May 9 parade marking the defeat of Nazi Germany in World War II without heavy military equipment for the first time since 2007, as the war in Ukraine takes its toll on President Vladimir Putin’s army.

title: Mercedes Set to Challenge UK’s £7.5 Billion Motor Finance Plan
title_cn: 梅赛德斯将挑战英国 75 亿英镑的汽车融资计划
summary: Mercedes-Benz Group AG’s financial services unit filed an appeal challenging the UK’s £7.5 billion plan to compensate customers who were overcharged for auto loans.

title: Taiwan Leader’s Last-Minute Plea to Fly Via Europe Was Rejected
title_cn: 台湾领导人最后一刻请求飞经欧洲遭拒绝
summary: Germany and the Czech Republic denied requests for Taiwan President Lai Ching-te to transit through Europe earlier this month, dooming his last-minute effort to circumvent a China-backed blockade of his first diplomatic trip to Africa, people familiar with the matter said.

title: North Korea Nuclear Arms Shield Kim From Trump
title_cn: 朝鲜核武器保护金正恩免受特朗普的侵害
summary: Kim Jong Un has shown no sign that the US president can entice him to abandon nuclear ambitions.

title: Slovak Premier Fico Attacker Sentenced to 21 Years, TASR Says
title_cn: TASR 称斯洛伐克总理 Fico 袭击者被判处 21 年徒刑
summary: Slovakia’s Supreme Court upheld a 21-year prison sentence for Juraj Cintula for the attempted assassination of Prime Minister Robert Fico, ruling the act a terrorist attack, Slovak TASR news agency reports.

title: Australia’s Richest Person Gifts Jet to Far-Right Party Head
title_cn: 澳大利亚首富向极右党领袖赠送专机
summary: Australia’s richest person, Gina Rinehart, has donated a plane to Pauline Hanson, the leader of the country’s hard-right One Nation Party.

title: Trump’s $1.5 Trillion Defense Plan Draws Rare Republican Pushback
title_cn: 特朗普 1.5 万亿美元的国防计划罕见地遭到共和党的抵制
summary: Key congressional Republicans are poised to break with Donald Trump on his proposed 44% raise for the Pentagon, a rare act of defiance that signals the president’s weakening grip on Washington as the midterm elections near and he quickly approaches the back half of his second term.

title: The King Charms Trump, But Starmer’s US Ordeal Will Continue
title_cn: 国王迷住了特朗普，但斯塔默在美国的磨难还将继续
summary: In one legislative chamber, a British king appealed to centuries of shared history in a bid to preserve his country’s most important alliance. In another, an ocean away, a British prime minister watched his agenda get sidelined again by his past efforts to protect the US-UK “special relationship.”

title: Federal Reserve Expected to Hold Rates
title_cn: 美联储预计将维持利率不变
summary: Federal Reserve officials are expected to leave interest rates unchanged on Wednesday, holding the benchmark rate in a range of 3.5% to 3.75% for a third consecutive meeting. Investors will be looking for clues about how long the Fed is willing to maintain its patient posture, as well as what Chair Jerome Powell says about his future at the central bank. Bloomberg's Jill Disis reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Philippine Panel Finds Probable Cause to Impeach VP Duterte
title_cn: 菲律宾专家小组找到弹劾副总统杜特尔特的可能理由
summary: The impeachment effort against Philippine Vice President Sara Duterte was advanced by a key congressional panel, paving the way for further battles over a politician who aims to be a contender in 2028’s presidential election.

title: Ex-Thai PM Thaksin Set for Parole After Eight Months in Prison
title_cn: 泰国前总理他信入狱八个月后准备假释
summary: Former Thai premier Thaksin Shinawatra will be released on parole after serving eight months in jail, paving the way for his possible return to politics as his family’s party takes a lesser role in a new conservative-led government.

title: Trump Says Iran ‘Better Get Smart Soon’
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗“最好尽快变得聪明起来”
summary: President Donald Trump, in a post on Truth Social, said Iran doesn’t “know how to sign a nonnuclear deal” and needs to “get smart soon.” His comments come after the US signaled it would stick with a naval blockade in the Strait of Hormuz as it tries to choke off Tehran’s oil exports and force it back to the negotiating table. Bloomberg's Joumanna Bercetche reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Republicans Eye Capital Gains Tax Cut to Ease Voters’ Anxieties
title_cn: 共和党希望通过减税来缓解选民的焦虑
summary: Republican lawmakers are looking at ways to lower taxes on capital gains as the party searches for new ways to woo voters worried about the cost of living heading into November’s midterm elections.

title: Iran War Fuels Piracy Surge Off Somalia Coast, EU Agency Says
title_cn: 欧盟机构称伊朗战争助长索马里海岸海盗激增
summary: The war in Iran is fueling a resurgence in maritime piracy off the coast of Somalia, according to a European Union naval force patrolling the region.

title: Japanese Crude Supertanker Manages Hormuz Exit in War First
title_cn: 日本原油超级油轮在战争中首次管理霍尔木兹出口
summary: A laden supertanker linked to Japan appears to have completed a transit through the Strait of Hormuz, in what may be the first successful attempt by an oil carrier from the country to leave the Persian Gulf since the Iran war began.

title: Cities Need to Boost Green Investment for Safety, EIB Chief Says
title_cn: 欧洲投资银行行长表示，城市需要促进安全绿色投资
summary: Cities are increasing investment in the green transition to protect against the potentially catastrophic effects of climate change, the European Investment Bank president said.

title: Meloni Backs Italy’s Justice Minister Over Pardon of Berlusconi Ally
title_cn: 梅洛尼支持意大利司法部长赦免贝卢斯科尼盟友
summary: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni backed her justice minister over his role in a controversial pardon of a former showgirl and close associate of Silvio Berlusconi.

title: Modi Seeks First Win in West Bengal With Polls in Last Phase
title_cn: 莫迪在最后阶段的民意调查中寻求西孟加拉邦的首场胜利
summary: Millions of voters in India’s eastern state of West Bengal head to the polls on Wednesday in the final phase of a key local election, as Prime Minister Narendra Modi seeks to win there for the first time.

title: Von der Leyen Warns Iran War May Damage Europe for Years
title_cn: 冯德莱恩警告伊朗战争可能会损害欧洲多年
summary: The European Union warned the continent may spend years grappling with fallout from the US-Israeli war in Iran, signaling that an energy price spike will not abate soon.
